hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then base=$(basename "$f" .py); if [ "$base" != "__init__" ] && [ "$base" != "conftest" ]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run pytest -x -q --tb=line -k "$base" -m "not integration" 2>/dev/null | tail -5; fi; fi; exit 0; }

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); import os; name=os.path.basename(p); sys.exit(2 if (name=='.env' or p.endswith('/.env') or '.git/' in p or 'credentials' in name) else 0)"

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q -- '--autogenerate'; then grep -q 'include_name' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/alembic/env.py" 2>/dev/null || { echo 'BLOCKED: include_name schema filter missing from alembic/env.py. Autogenerate without it will corrupt Supabase-managed schemas (auth, storage, realtime). See failure-patterns.md PF-3.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; exit 0; }
osascript -e 'display notification "Awaiting input" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
